title: Norwegian Smoked Salmon Pancake Roll-Ups
description: Delicate pancake rolls filled with smoked salmon, a delightful Scandinavian-inspired breakfast dish.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Butter the skillet and add a small amount of chopped fresh dill.
Place a pancake in the skillet and top with 1 oz of smoked salmon.
Roll up the pancake and secure with a toothpick.
Repeat with remaining pancakes and salmon.
Serve with a fried egg on top.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
